Fox Rothschild.hook: Fox Rothschild has been aggressively expanding nationally, adding partners across multiple offices and practices. They offer a platform with real autonomy and cross-selling opportunity.

Goulston & Storrs.hook: Goulston is making strategic lateral hires to deepen their bench in key practice areas. Known for a collegial culture and strong real estate/corporate foundation.

Mintz.hook: Mintz is building out Destination Litigation and Middle Market M&A/PE. Strong life sciences and tech platform. Looking for partners who can be market leaders.

Akerman.hook: Akerman has been one of the most active lateral hiring firms nationally — they've grown rapidly across Miami, NY, Dallas, and other markets. Entrepreneurial culture with strong cross-selling.

Blank Rome.hook: Blank Rome is expanding its national footprint, particularly in NY, DC, and Texas. Known for a strong maritime, insurance, and white collar practice.

Dentons.hook: Dentons offers the world's largest law firm platform — global reach with entrepreneurial local autonomy. Strong for cross-border work and partners who want to grow internationally.

Foley & Lardner.hook: Foley has a deep Midwest and national presence with strong industry-sector focus. Known for health care, tech, and energy practices.

Seyfarth.hook: Seyfarth is the leader in labor & employment but has been strategically building corporate, real estate, and commercial litigation. Known for operational efficiency and tech-forward approach.

Haynes and Boone.hook: Haynes and Boone is one of the premier Texas-rooted firms with a growing national presence. Strong energy, tech, and IP practices. Dallas, Houston, and Austin powerhouse.

DLA Piper.hook: DLA Piper is one of the largest global firms with massive cross-border M&A, real estate, and IP capabilities. Ideal for partners who want a global platform.

Holland & Knight.hook: Holland & Knight has been one of the most aggressive lateral hiring firms, particularly in Florida, DC, and Texas. Full-service platform with a strong government and real estate foundation.

Reed Smith.hook: Reed Smith is expanding nationally with strength in financial services, life sciences, and entertainment. Strong global platform with European reach.

Hogan Lovells.hook: Hogan Lovells is a top-tier global firm with exceptional DC and international reach. Strong government regulatory, IP, and corporate M&A.

Sidley Austin.hook: Sidley is an elite full-service firm with particular strength in structured finance, investment funds, and high-stakes litigation. Big platform, big deal flow.

McDermott.hook: McDermott has been one of the most active lateral firms — dramatically expanding their platform. Known for health care, tax, and private equity.

Goodwin.hook: Goodwin is the leading PE/VC firm with dominant market share in fund formation and tech M&A. Ideal for partners in the innovation economy.

Paul Hastings.hook: Paul Hastings has been on a tear with lateral hiring — dominant in leveraged finance, M&A, and employment. Premium platform with a partnership-first culture.

Eversheds Sutherland.hook: Eversheds is strategically building their US platform with cross-border capabilities. Strong in capital markets, insurance transactional, and LatAm. Equity partner track with 2M+ portables.

Stradley Ronon.hook: Stradley Ronon is opening new offices in Boston and South Florida — rare ground-floor opportunities. Known for investment management and a 'bigger fish in a smaller pond' culture.

Husch Blackwell.hook: Husch Blackwell has a unique SBU (Strategic Business Unit) model — entrepreneurial and comp rewards both originators and workers. Their aviation group is expanding and actively seeking specialists.

Kasowitz.hook: Kasowitz is a pure litigation powerhouse — known for high-stakes commercial disputes. Ideal for elite litigators who want trial-focused work.

Brown Rudnick.hook: Brown Rudnick has a distinctive entrepreneurial model and has been expanding in DC, Boston, and NY. Strong in restructuring and corporate.

Sheppard Mullin.hook: Sheppard Mullin is a leading California-rooted firm with growing national reach. Strong in entertainment, tech, and finance.

Katten.hook: Katten has deep expertise in structured finance, fund formation, and real estate capital markets. Strong NY and Chicago presence.

Cooley.hook: Cooley dominates the VC/startup ecosystem — #1 in VC fund formation and emerging company representation. Ideal for innovation-economy partners.

ArentFox Schiff.hook: ArentFox Schiff (post-merger) is building a combined national platform with strength in IP, government contracts, and real estate.

Troutman Pepper.hook: Troutman Pepper is a merger success story — one of the most active lateral hiring firms nationally. Strong insurance, financial services, and litigation platform.

Dechert.hook: Dechert is a leading financial services and PE firm with global reach. Known for asset management and high-end litigation.

Dorsey & Whitney.hook: Dorsey is a strong Midwest/West firm expanding nationally. Known for mining, energy, and a collegial culture.

Saul Ewing.hook: Saul Ewing offers a strong mid-Atlantic platform expanding to new markets. Known for real estate, corporate, and insurance.

Nixon Peabody.hook: Nixon Peabody is expanding nationally with strength in affordable housing, financial services, and government investigations.

Perkins Coie.hook: Perkins Coie is a premier tech and IP firm expanding from its West Coast base to national markets. Known for political law, tech, and startup representation.

Pillsbury.hook: Pillsbury is a top-tier platform for energy, real estate, and financial services with strong West Coast and DC presence.

Cadwalader.hook: Cadwalader is America's oldest law firm with a dominant structured finance and capital markets practice. Boutique feel, elite work.

Fenwick.hook: Fenwick is a Silicon Valley icon expanding to new markets. Dominant in tech M&A, IP, and VC work.

Allen Matkins.hook: Allen Matkins is the leading California real estate firm. Premium boutique with deep specialization.

Withers.hook: Withers is a unique international private client firm — trust & estates, tax, and family office. Niche and elite.

Robinson & Cole.hook: Robinson & Cole is a strong Northeast firm expanding into new markets. Known for construction, real estate, and insurance.

Winstead.hook: Winstead is a Texas powerhouse expanding to NY. Strong real estate and financial services platform.

Thompson Hine.hook: Thompson Hine offers a strong Midwest platform with growing national reach. Known for transportation, manufacturing, and real estate.

McCarter & English.hook: McCarter & English is expanding nationally from its Northeast base. Strong insurance, corporate, and real estate practice.

Buchanan.hook: Buchanan Ingersoll is a mid-market firm expanding to new cities. Strong in energy, financial services, and healthcare.

FBT/Gibbons.hook: FBT/Gibbons is expanding nationally with strength in Newark/NJ market, white collar, and real estate.

Pryor Cashman.hook: Pryor Cashman is a premier mid-market NYC firm with strong IP, entertainment, and real estate practices. Known for entrepreneurial culture.

UB Greensfelder.hook: UB Greensfelder is a growing Midwest/regional firm expanding into NY and Chicago. Good for partners who want more client attention and autonomy.

Armstrong Teasdale.hook: Armstrong Teasdale is aggressively expanding nationally — open to lower book sizes if the fit is right. Flexible and entrepreneurial.

Womble Bond Dickinson.hook: Womble Bond Dickinson offers a transatlantic platform (US+UK) with sweet-spot rates of $650-900. Growing in key markets.

Miles Stockbridge.hook: Miles & Stockbridge is a leading mid-Atlantic firm expanding into DC and NY. Strong for partners who want a regional platform with growth potential.

Caplin & Drysdale.hook: Caplin & Drysdale is an elite boutique known for tax controversy and political law. Selective but flexible on book size.

Davis Graham & Stubbs.hook: Davis Graham is the premier Colorado firm. Strong in natural resources, real estate, and corporate.

Levenfeld Perlstein.hook: Levenfeld Perlstein is a Chicago boutique with a collegial culture. Good for partners who want mid-market autonomy.

Latham & Watkins.hook: Latham is a global elite firm — the world's highest-grossing law firm. For partners with major books looking for top-tier platform.

Winston & Strawn.hook: Winston & Strawn is a premier litigation firm with a growing corporate and restructuring practice. Strong Chicago and national presence.

Gibson Dunn.hook: Gibson Dunn is an elite global firm known for Supreme Court and appellate work, white collar, and M&A. For the very top tier.

Simpson Thacher & Bartlett.hook: Simpson Thacher is the gold standard for PE and M&A. Ultra-elite platform, the top of the market.
